name: windows-appshot
description: Capture foreground Windows app context for Codex CLI as a screenshot and UI Automation text bundle.

interface.shortDescription: Capture Windows app context for Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Windows Appshot provides PowerShell helpers and a Codex skill for capturing the foreground Windows window as a screenshot plus available UI Automation text, then handing that bundle to Codex through supported CLI image and file inputs.
defaultPrompt: Use my latest appshot as context.
